data.body: TDD RED phase for hook allowlist cleanup. Add test_no_v2_allowlist_in_hook_tests to test-v2-clean-guard.sh: grep tests/hooks/ for assertions that check old v2 tickets directory allowlist pattern. Assert output is empty. FAILS RED since test-deps.sh and others currently assert v2 pattern is in allowlist. Depends on T1 guard file existing.
